top_issue: Inconsistency in evidence quality and lack of context about sources' credibility.

The sub-report lacks sufficient direct evidence to support claims about sector-specific calibration readiness and enterprise spending on AI compliance infrastructure, which undermines the strength of its conclusions.
Lack of detailed context and clarity regarding sources and evidence.
Lack of detailed information on the CEN/CENELEC standards development process and successful case studies of standards influence campaigns.
